description_long: This is a modern apartment complex consisting of several mid-rise buildings arranged on a paved lot with landscaped greenery. The most striking feature is a tall, narrow tower supporting a large, cantilevered block at its top, which appears to house additional apartments or communal spaces. The buildings are primarily white or light gray, with large, regularly spaced windows and flat roofs, some of which have rooftop amenities or mechanical structures. The ground level includes planted trees and shrubs, providing a pleasant urban environment. The window arrangement is highly geometric and consistent, contributing to a clean, contemporary aesthetic. Entrances are visible at the base of several buildings, suggesting multiple access points for residents.
description: A modern apartment complex with several mid-rise buildings, featuring a unique cantilevered tower and geometric window patterns, set on a landscaped urban lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cantilevered tower in the background and three main apartment buildings with visible entrances and landscaping in the foreground.
description_view_1: Direct frontal view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of buildings, the central cantilevered tower, and the landscaped trees along the street.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the depth of the lot, the alignment of buildings, and the cantilevered structure's overhang.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back sides of the buildings, the base of the cantilevered tower, and additional greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with consistent spacing and alignment across all building facades, contributing to a sense of symmetry and order.
